title: Talking About Colors 谈论颜色
scene: 两个小朋友在画画时讨论喜欢的颜色。

lines.en: Leo, what is your favorite color?
lines.zh: 里奥，你最喜欢什么颜色？

lines.en: My favorite color is blue. What about you?
lines.zh: 我最喜欢的颜色是蓝色。你呢？

lines.en: I love pink. It looks so pretty and warm.
lines.zh: 我喜欢粉色。它看起来又漂亮又温暖。

lines.en: Pink is nice! My mom likes pink too.
lines.zh: 粉色很好看！我妈妈也喜欢粉色。

lines.en: My room is light blue. It makes me feel calm.
lines.zh: 我的房间是浅蓝色的。它让我感到平静。

lines.en: That sounds lovely! I painted my room yellow.
lines.zh: 听起来真好！我把房间刷成了黄色。

lines.en: Yellow? That's a bright and happy color!
lines.zh: 黄色？那是一个明亮又快乐的颜色！

lines.en: Yes! What color are you using for the sky in your drawing?
lines.zh: 是的！你画里的天空用什么颜色？

lines.en: I'm using orange and purple. The sky looks beautiful at sunset.
lines.zh: 我用橙色和紫色。日落时的天空很美。
